generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor providing torque output (τ_M) based on input current (I_M) for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot. Controlled via Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC."
]

instance GearTransmission : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Mechanical gear transmission component converting motor torque (τ_M) to intermediate gearbox torque (τ_G) for the first axis."
]

instance CycloidalGearbox : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox providing final torque output (τ_out) and angular velocity (ω_out) for the first axis of the robot."
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Primary encoder mounted directly on the permanent magnet synchronous motor providing angular position data (r_M) for the first axis."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorEncoderDataTransmitted
]

instance SecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder mounted behind the gearbox providing angular position data (r_G) for backlash and positional uncertainty reduction."
    DTDFVocab:producedData SecondaryEncoderDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor measuring input current (I_M) to the permanent magnet synchronous motor, converted to torque using motor constants."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance MotorEncoderDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance SecondaryEncoderDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryEncoder
]

instance MotorCurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance SysMLBlockDefinitionDiagram : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram describing structural components (motor, gearboxes) and their interconnections (rotational/current flows) for the first axis."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance SysMLInternalBlockDiagram : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram instantiating the first axis system with concrete components (Motor, Gearwheel, CycloidalGearbox)."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White-box Coulomb-Viscous friction model implemented in Simulink/MATLAB for friction characterization in the gearbox."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White-box Stribeck friction model implemented in Simulink/MATLAB for dynamic friction behavior simulation."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance DahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White-box Dahl friction model implemented in Simulink/MATLAB for capturing bristle behavior in gearbox friction."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White-box LuGre friction model implemented in Simulink/MATLAB for advanced friction dynamics simulation."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance FrictionlessGearboxModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Executable simulation model of a frictionless gearbox for baseline behavior comparison."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance FrictionInclusiveGearboxModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Executable simulation model incorporating friction components (static, kinetic, viscous) for accurate gearbox behavior prediction."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance MotorSimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink/MATLAB model predicting torque (τ_M) and angular velocity (ω_M) output from motor current (I_M) inputs."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance MeasuredMotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data of input current (I_M) to the permanent magnet synchronous motor, streamed via MQTT."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, DataProcessingEnabler
]

instance MeasuredMotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular position data (r_M) from the motor encoder, used for deriving angular velocity (ω_M)."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, DataProcessingEnabler
]

instance MeasuredGearboxPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular position data (r_G) from the secondary encoder behind the gearbox for backlash analysis."
    DTDFVocab:fromData SecondaryEncoderDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, DataProcessingEnabler
]

instance SimulatedMotorTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated motor torque (δτ_M) derived from the MotorSimulationModel using input current (I_M)."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DeviationAnalysisService
]

instance SimulatedGearboxTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated gearbox torque (δτ_G) incorporating friction models for comparison with measured data."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DeviationAnalysisService
]

instance SimulatedSystemOutputData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated system output torque (δτ_out) and angular velocity (δω_out) from the friction-inclusive gearbox model."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DeviationAnalysisService
]

// C11: Enablers
instance SysMLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML modeling tool enabling structural and behavioral modeling via Block Definition Diagrams and Internal Block Diagrams."
    DTDFVocab:enables StructuralModelingService, SystemInstantiationService
]

instance SimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks Simulink/MATLAB environment for executable friction and dynamics simulations of the first axis components."
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionSimulationService, DynamicsSimulationService, ModelExchangeService
]

instance MQTTDataStreamingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time transmission of sensor data (I_M, r_M, r_G) from physical system to digital shadow."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeDataStreamingService
]

instance AssetAdministrationShellEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell framework integrating models and live data for the digital twin constellation."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataIntegrationService, ModelIntegrationService
]

instance ModelBasedSystemsEngineeringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MBSE methodologies (RFLP, OOSEM) for managing system complexity in the digital twin development."
    DTDFVocab:enables SystemComplexityManagementService
]

instance DataProcessingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Data processing pipeline converting raw sensor inputs (I_M, r_M, r_G) into derived quantities (τ_M, ω_M, τ_G, ω_G)."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataDerivationService
]

instance VisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unified dashboard for displaying data traces, models, and deviations in a single interface."
    DTDFVocab:enables UnifiedVisualizationService
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeDataStreamingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing real-time transmission of sensor data (I_M, r_M, r_G) via MQTT protocol to the digital shadow."
    DTDFVocab:provides SensorDataInsight
]

instance FrictionSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service integrating white-box (Coulomb-Viscous, Stribeck, Dahl, LuGre) and black-box friction models for executable simulations."
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionCharacterizationInsight, ModelAccuracyInsight
]

instance DynamicsSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service simulating motor and gearbox dynamics (τ_M, ω_M, τ_G, ω_G) using executable models."
    DTDFVocab:provides DynamicsPredictionInsight
]

instance DeviationAnalysisService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service comparing simulated data (δτ, δω) vs. measured/reference data (τ, ω) to quantify discrepancies."
    DTDFVocab:provides DeviationMetricsInsight, ModelAccuracyInsight
]

instance UnifiedVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing a unified dashboard displaying data traces, models, and deviations for physical system understanding."
    DTDFVocab:provides SystemUnderstandingInsight
]

instance ModelExchangeService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service enabling dynamic exchange of friction models (e.g., switching between Coulomb-Viscous and LuGre) during operation."
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelAdaptationInsight
]

instance DataDerivationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service converting raw sensor inputs into derived physical quantities (torque, velocity) for analysis."
    DTDFVocab:provides DerivedDataInsight
]

instance StructuralModelingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service creating SysML Block Definition Diagrams for structural component modeling."
    DTDFVocab:provides StructuralModelInsight
]

instance SystemInstantiationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service instantiating the first axis system with concrete components via SysML Internal Block Diagrams."
    DTDFVocab:provides SystemInstantiationInsight
]

instance DataIntegrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service integrating live sensor data with simulation models via Asset Administration Shell."
    DTDFVocab:provides IntegratedDataInsight
]

instance ModelIntegrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service integrating executable simulation models with live data for cohesive digital twin operation."
    DTDFVocab:provides IntegratedModelInsight
]

instance SystemComplexityManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service managing system complexity using MBSE methodologies (RFLP, OOSEM) for the digital twin."
    DTDFVocab:provides ComplexityManagementInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance SensorDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time sensor data (I_M, r_M, r_G) streamed from the physical system to the digital shadow via MQTT."
]

instance FrictionCharacterizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Identification of static, kinetic, and viscous friction components in the cycloidal gearbox for the first axis."
]

instance ModelAccuracyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Quantification of simulated vs. measured discrepancies (δτ, δω) to assess model accuracy."
]

instance DynamicsPredictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted motor and gearbox dynamics (τ_M, ω_M, τ_G, ω_G) for comparison with measured data."
]

instance DeviationMetricsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Metrics quantifying friction loss and inaccuracies between simulated and measured system behavior."
]

instance SystemUnderstandingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Unified visualization of data traces, models, and deviations for comprehensive system understanding."
]

instance ModelAdaptationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Ability to dynamically swap friction models (e.g., Coulomb-Viscous to LuGre) based on real-time data trends."
]

instance DerivedDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Derived physical quantities (torque, velocity) from raw sensor inputs for analysis and comparison."
]

instance StructuralModelInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Structural model of the first axis components (motor, gearboxes) and their interconnections via SysML."
]

instance SystemInstantiationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Concrete instantiation of the first axis system with specific components (Motor, Gearwheel, CycloidalGearbox)."
]

instance IntegratedDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Integration of live sensor data with simulation models via Asset Administration Shell framework."
]

instance IntegratedModelInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Cohesive integration of executable simulation models with live data for digital twin operation."
]

instance ComplexityManagementInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Management of system complexity using MBSE methodologies (RFLP, OOSEM) for the digital twin development."
]

instance ParameterUpdateAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Indirect output for adjusting control algorithms (e.g., CNC compensation) to improve motion accuracy."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance OperationalRecommendationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Suggestions for model refinements (e.g., switching friction models) based on real-time data trends."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The **twinning time scale** is **real-time (online)** with continuous synchronization:
  - **Live data acquisition**: Sensor data is streamed via MQTT with **low-latency requirements** for friction identification.
  - **Dynamic model updates**: Friction models are **continuously refined** during operation to account for **wear, temperature, or load changes**.
  - **No explicit synchronization frequency** is specified, but the system implies **high-frequency updates** (e.g., per motor cycle or encoder tick) for accurate motion control."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The **digital twin constellation** is orchestrated as follows:
  - **Centralized architecture**: The digital shadow is a **passive entity** (one-way data flow from PT to DS), with **active processing components** (e.g., simulation models) interpreting live data.
  - **Component Interactions**:
    - **Sources** (sensors, CNC controller) → **Data Traces** → **Processing Components** (simulation models) → **Output Data Traces**.
    - **Models** (*SysML*, *Simulink*) describe the **asset (MABI robot)** and its **behavioral dynamics**.
  - **Data Flow**:
    - **MQTT-streamed sensor data** → **Processing (Simulink/MATLAB)** → **Friction model comparison** → **Dashboard visualization**.
  - **No explicit cloud/edge deployment**: The system implies **local processing** (e.g., on-site CNC or edge server) for low-latency requirements."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The **life-cycle stages** covered by the digital shadow include:
  - **As-operated representation**: The digital shadow focuses on the **real-time operational state** of the first axis, capturing **live friction behavior** under varying conditions (e.g., load, temperature).
  - **No explicit design/manufacturing phases**: The system does not model the **as-designed (ideal)** or **as-manufactured** states; it operates purely on **operational data**.
  - **Continuous evolution**: The digital shadow supports **dynamic updates** to friction models during operation to adapt to **wear or environmental changes**."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "The **fidelity and validity considerations** include:
  - **Model Fidelity**:
    - **White-box models** (analytical) provide **physical interpretability** but require **parameter tuning**.
    - **Black-box models** (data-driven) avoid parameterization but lack **explainability**.
    - **Hybrid approach**: Combines both for **balanced accuracy and adaptability**.
  - **Validation Mechanisms**:
    - **Deviation analysis**: Compare **simulated vs. measured data** to validate friction models.
    - **Traceability**: Each data point is linked to its **source** and **processing method** for reproducibility.
  - **Uncertainty Sources**:
    - **Sensor noise** (e.g., encoder resolution limits).
    - **Model approximations** (e.g., simplified gearbox dynamics).
    - **Environmental factors** (e.g., temperature, wear) not fully captured in static models.
  - **Verification**: No explicit mention of formal verification methods (e.g., model checking), but **empirical validation** via real-time data comparison."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The **digital twin technical connection** includes:
  - **Network Protocol**: **MQTT** for **real-time, low-latency sensor data streaming** from the robot to the digital shadow.
  - **Data Format**: Time-series data (e.g., *I_M*, angular position) transmitted as **floating-point arrays** with metadata.
  - **Architecture**: **Centralized processing** (likely on-site or edge server) to minimize latency for motion control.
  - **No explicit cloud integration**: Implies **local deployment** for immediate feedback to the CNC controller."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The **digital twin hosting/deployment** is implied to be:
  - **Local/edge deployment**: Processing occurs **proximate to the physical system** (e.g., on the CNC controller or a nearby server) to ensure **real-time responsiveness**.
  - **No cloud dependency**: Avoids latency issues critical for **high-precision machining**.
  - **Dashboard visualization**: Likely hosted on a **local workstation** or **industrial HMI** for operator interaction."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The **standardization** efforts include:
  - **Asset Administration Shell (AAS)**: Used for **integrating models and live data** in a standardized format.
  - **SysML**: Adheres to **OMG’s Systems Modeling Language** standards for system modeling.
  - **MQTT**: Follows **OASIS MQTT protocol** standards for IoT data streaming.
  - **No explicit industry standards** (e.g., ISO/DIN) are mentioned for digital twins or robotics."
]
